notes: Multi Studio version 2.1.33: Added Expand All and Collapse All toolbar controls in Script Studio to quickly toggle all script blocks between a compact 2-line preview and full editing mode., Added block Expand and Collapse buttons to individual script block headers, allowing users to collapse long blocks to 2 lines (`...`) for better workspace visibility., Added a "Mark as Completed" checkbox and visual completion badge to script blocks, allowing users to review, check off, or mark blocks for re-rendering., Added a Completed Blocks counter badge (`X/Y completed`) in the Script Studio top toolbar to track review progress., Added per-block SRT subtitle export inside ZIP archives (`audio_parts/001_name.srt`), placing subtitle files right alongside their corresponding audio segment files., Fixed an "Out of memory" export crash when combining multi-block projects into MP3 audio format by delegating combined audio assembly directly to the native desktop backend instead of processing large audio data in browser memory., Fixed separate SRT subtitle export so it includes individual block SRT files inside the project ZIP archive instead of opening an extra single-file download dialog outside the ZIP package.
